name: @career-ops/server
description: Local HTTP companion that bridges the Chrome extension to the career-ops CLI pipeline. Phase 1 = contracts only.

scripts.build:js: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:types && pnpm run build:js
